item.title: Binary Numbers
item.description: A binary number, b, is an element from a Binary Algebra \mathbb{B}.

item.title: Boolean Rings
item.description: Boolean Rings are an Algebra (S,\otimes,\land) with two binary operations which satisfy the following axioms: Axioms #NameFOL1.Closure under addition\forall a,b \in S: a\otimes b \in S2.Associativity under addition\forall a,b \in S : (a \otimes b) \otimes c = a \otimes (b \otimes c)3.Commutativity u...

item.title: Logical Operators
item.description: Going forward the set \{0,1\} will be referred to as “Boolean Logic” Logical Operators Here is a list of logical operators.

item.title: Operation
item.description: Operation An operation is a function which takes a predefined finite number of inputs and whos domain is a power of its codomain.

item.title: Xor
item.description: Xor is a logical binary operation which takes two values of the set of \mathbb{Z} / 2 and applies the “exclusive or” function which only returns 1 if both operands are different and will otherwise return 0.

item.title: index
item.description: About These notes are part of an ongoing effort to build a structured reference for mathematical concepts I study and use in programming and theoretical work.

item.title: Basic Algebraic Structures
item.description: Algebra (\mathcal{S},☿,...) An Algebra is a set with any number of operations with any arities Magma A Magma is a set with a binary operation.

item.title: Digraphs
item.description: Definition A digraph is a set with a binary relation (set of ordered pairs made from elements in the set) on it. It is simpler than a group.

item.title: Equivalence Relations
item.description: Equivalence Relations a relation \sim is an equivalence relation if it satisfies the following properties Reflexivity x \sim x Symmetry x \sim y \iff y \sim x Transitivity x \sim y \land y \sim z \implies x \sim z Equivalence relations cleanly partition sets.

item.title: Isomorphism
item.description: Isomorphism is a powerful tool in mathematics.
